selected_important_turn.text: I need a minimum of 2 firewood. You can have 2 water. I would now like 2 food.
selected_important_turn.why_important: This is the first strong, concrete escalation after the opponent rejected your initial demand. It locks the interaction into a competitive, zero-sum bargaining frame by asserting a firm minimum and adding additional claims (2 food) rather than opening trades or exploring underlying needs.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: It is rigid and self-focused: it repeats a minimum demand and carves up resources without acknowledging the opponent's stated need for firewood or seeking tradeable preferences. That narrows options and increases likelihood of stalemate or further hard bargaining.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Shift away from anchoring/insisting and toward joint problem-solving: acknowledge the opponent's firewood need, ask clarifying questions about why 2 firewood is required, and propose contingent tradeoffs (e.g., 'If you need 2 firewood, would you accept X water now and Y food later?' or offer to split firewood and compensate with more of lower-priority items). Frame proposals as options rather than ultimatums.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: likely increase — opening trade options and asking questions can reveal opportunities for Pareto improvements
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: improve — clearer, dialogic bargaining tends to produce more balanced outcomes than hard demands
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase — reducing ultimatums and offering options lowers resistance and speeds convergence
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: improve — acknowledging the other's need and using questions builds trust vs. hard demands

value2reason.Low: I have a friend that can not bring his own food.
value2reason.Medium: the temperature will be high and i will be camping.
value2reason.High: I will not be in a wooded area.

value2reason.Low: In case a member of my family gets hungry at some point.
value2reason.Medium: Water is essential for survival and having extra would give me peace of mind that my family has what is needed.
value2reason.High: My family's comfort is my most important priority.

dialogue.text: I would like to ask for 3 firewood, 1 water and 0 food. I will be in an area where no extra wood will be available and I need the wood to cook all the food that I will already have.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I understand where you're coming from but I'm afraid that is not acceptable.  My family's comfort is my top priority and I will be needing at least 2 firewoods to make sure they are kept warm.  I would also request some extra water.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I need a minimum of 2 firewood. You can have 2 water. I would now like 2 food.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I can offer you 2 firewood and 1 water, but I need to ensure I get at least 1 firewood and 2 water for my family's comfort. Let’s find a fair split that works for both of us.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I see your need for firewood, but I’m concerned about the water allocation. If you need 2 firewood, would you consider accepting 2 water now and 1 food later? That way, we can both meet our priorities without leaving packages unassigned.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I'm willing to accept 2 firewood and 1 water if you can agree to 1 food. This way, I secure enough firewood for my family's comfort and you get the water you need. Let’s finalize this split.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I'm open to that split. Let me confirm: 2 firewood, 1 water, and 1 food for me, and 1 firewood, 2 water, and 1 food for you? That covers all packages and respects both our priorities.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Agreed. Final split: 2 firewood, 1 water, 1 food for me, and 1 firewood, 2 water, 1 food for you. All packages are allocated, and both our priorities are respected.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: The deal has already been confirmed. I am leaving now.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1
